channel.title: Mesh on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Mesh on Pi Stack

item.title: Cjdns vs Yggdrasil vs Nebula: Best Self-Hosted Mesh Networks 2026
item.description: Building a private, encrypted network that spans multiple locations should not require trusting a third-party VPN provider or relying on a centralized coordination server. Self-hosted mesh and overlay networking tools solve this problem by letting you create your own secure network fabric — one where every node can communicate directly, traffic is encrypted end-to-end, and no single point of failure can bring down the entire system.
